creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
(In reply to xxjack12xx from comment #28)
Perhaps, patch-Makefile.am, patch-configure.ac and patch-include_Makefile.am of attachment 166826 are existed in your audio/audacity/files directory.
Would you retry the order below?
1. revert audio/audacity directory.
2. patch attachment 168069 for checking bug 206914.
3. patch attachment 166826 for checking bug 207074.
